# Soundcheck

Soundcheck is a Swedish concert discovery app at https://soundcheck.fun/.
It is also searched for as Sound Check, Soundcheck.fun, Soundcheck Uppsala, Soundcheck konserter, Soundcheck spelningar and sound check fun.

## What Soundcheck Does

Soundcheck collects concerts, gigs, live music and spelningar from multiple sources into one searchable view, with a focus on Uppsala and nearby cities.
Visitors can browse concerts, filter by artist, venue, city, source, month and genre, and use quick views such as this week, this weekend and latest added.
Signed-in users can save favorites, mark concerts they are going to, track seen concerts, and follow artists and venues.

## Important Pages

- Home: https://soundcheck.fun/
- Concerts: https://soundcheck.fun/spelningar
- Merch: https://soundcheck.fun/merch
- Sources: https://soundcheck.fun/kallor
- Help: https://soundcheck.fun/hjalp
- Contact: https://soundcheck.fun/kontakt

## Brand

Preferred name: Soundcheck
Domain: soundcheck.fun
Primary Swedish description: Soundcheck samlar spelningar, konserter och livemusik i Uppsala med omnejd.
Primary English description: Soundcheck collects gigs, concerts and live music in Uppsala and nearby cities.
